positive: An intricate, symmetrical celestial botanical pattern designed for high contrast apparel print. The central motif features stylized, intertwining branches of glowing lunar flora and cosmic constellations. Incorporate detailed, simplified silhouettes of phases of the moon, ethereal nebulae painted in deep indigo and sapphire blue, contrasted sharply against glowing sage green and gold accents. The style must be highly graphic, neo-geometric, and slightly psychedelic, emphasizing clean lines and strong, clear separation between elements. Use volumetric lighting to make the glowing elements pop against the deep midnight background. Composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, designed to scale beautifully across a garment.
negative: text, words, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, artifacts, grainy, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, misplaced features, noisy, cluttered, realism, photographic, jpeg artifacts
